subject: iPhone keyboard lagging or freezing in apps
description: Typing in Messages, Mail, or other apps shows noticeable delay between keypress and character appearing; sometimes keyboard dismisses itself mid-sentence.

ts_steps.title: Check storage
ts_steps.action: General → iPhone Storage — free space if critically low.

ts_steps.title: Close apps
ts_steps.action: App switcher — swipe up all nonessential.

ts_steps.title: Third-party keyboards
ts_steps.action: Settings → General → Keyboard → Keyboards — remove one by one.

ts_steps.title: Reset Keyboard Dictionary
ts_steps.action: General → Transfer or Reset → Reset Keyboard Dictionary.

ts_steps.title: Single app reinstall
ts_steps.action: If only one app lags — delete reinstall from App Store.

ts_steps.title: Accessibility Slow Keys
ts_steps.action: Settings → Accessibility — ensure not enabled accidentally.

ts_steps.title: Force restart
ts_steps.action: Volume up, volume down, hold side to Apple logo.

ts_steps.title: Backup restore
ts_steps.action: Last resort if system-wide after update corruption suspected.

internal_information: Low storage, third-party keyboard leak, iOS bug, app-specific.
